title: pinus roxburghii
intro: Pinus roxburghii, also known as Chir Pine or Roxburgh's Pine, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pinus roxburghii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Pinus roxburghii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, extracts, and teas, which are often used to promote overall well-being.
